title: heptapleurum longifolium
intro: Heptapleurum longifolium, also known as the umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heptapleurum longifolium include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Heptapleurum longifolium is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
